The Gold Key Difference
Where Standards
Are Simply Expected.
⚓
A Berth Worth Belonging To

Gated access and monitored grounds mean your vessel is looked after the same way you look after it. Peace of mind, without making a point of it.

⚡
Everything In Its Place

30 and 50 amp service, freshwater, and pump-out — fully provisioned docks so you can focus on where you're going, not what you forgot to check.

🌊
Out in Minutes

Direct waterway access with no bridge delays. When conditions are right, you'll be underway before most people have finished their coffee.

📋
Straightforward Agreements

Clear monthly rates, no buried fees. Membership here is a relationship — and we'd rather earn your trust than bury it in fine print.

🤝
People Who Know Boats

Our dockmaster is reachable, knowledgeable, and here. Not a call center — an actual person who knows your slip and your vessel by name.

🚗
Arrive With Ease

Dedicated, well-lit parking with generous lanes for trailers and guests. Arrivals and departures happen on your schedule, without the squeeze.
